certificate_class: STATISTICAL (Monte Carlo + exact Clopper-Pearson bound); NOT the exact-rational class of B1
problem: B4: area theorem as gravity's composition law (conjecture ?3)
conservative_choices: exact binomial lower bound instead of MC point estimate

Large posterior HDF5s are not committed; download URLs recorded in data/README.md and this certificate.
